title: Valley Aquamarine
description: A modpack themed around fish, and the ocean
body:
a modpack themed around fish and the ocean with new armors, tools, biomes, freinds, animals, bosses ans everything that you could ask for in a chill expiriance made to be played with freinds, will you manage to complete the pack and obtain the conduit,

well see...

this pack was originaly made to play with freinds but i liked it so much that i thought i would release it

featuring mods like:upgrade aquatic, custom world genoration, alikis nifty ships, and aquamarae, this pack compleatly overhauls the ocean along with 2 other dimension overhauls using mods like: nether depths upgrade, blazing bambo, spelunkory, jadens nether expansion, endergetic expansion, and enlightend, this pack aims to be a more chill expiriance then regular minecraft even, a good pack to play for your next playthrough with freinds

<details>
<summary>licance</summary>

dont touch anything in the files
removing mods is not recomended

</details>
